channel.title: LCallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from LCallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: RNC sues to stop Democrats' Virginia redistricting push
item.description: RNC and two GOP lawmakers sue to stop Virginia Democrats' push to redraw congressional maps, claiming constitutional violations in amendment process.

item.title: Morning Minute: Don't Mess With Grandma
HHS wipes out 36,000 pages of ‘regulatory dark matter’ in sweeping child welfare office purge
item.description: Administration for Children and Families eliminated thousands of obsolete guidance documents to reduce confusion for the Head Start school readiness p...

item.title: Trump’s ‘no-nonsense’ DC crackdown tops 10k arrests as DOJ declares era of ‘unchecked violence is over’
item.description: Crime drops dramatically in Washington, D.C., as President Donald Trump's federal task force reports 10,000 arrests and 1,000 firearms recovered. Murd...

item.title: Tucker Carlson Caught in Humiliating Lie During Visit to Israel
Jay Bhattacharya to Serve As Acting CDC Director
How ICE went from post-9/11 counterterror agency to center of the immigration fight
item.description: ICE hasn't received much operational guidance from Congress since its creation, a break with lawmaker scrutiny over its operations under the Trump adm...

item.title: (Updated) Duke of Yorked: Andrew Reportedly Arrested in Epstein-Linked Scandal
DC Mayor Bowser declares emergency over Potomac sewage spill, asks for federal help
item.description: D.C. Mayor Muriel Bowser declared a disaster emergency over the historic Potomac sewage spill that dumped 240 million gallons into river.

item.title: IL Judge Rules Lawsuit Is Rotten Egg — Chicken Case Cracks Over Crucial Decision on Meaning of 'Wings'
